headline: PFE Stock Drops 3% On Surprise CFO Exit Despite Reaffirmed 2026 Guidance
summary: In a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission, Pfizer said Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Dave Denton notified the company on June 16 that he will step down effective August 15.

raw.headline: PFE Stock Drops 3% On Surprise CFO Exit Despite Reaffirmed 2026 Guidance
raw.summary: In a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission, Pfizer said Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Dave Denton notified the company on June 16 that he will step down effective August 15.

headline: Pfizer Shares Dip 1.5% as CFO Dave Denton Announces Exit
summary: Cecile Guegan will become interim CFO on Aug. 16 while Pfizer searches for a successor.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid LOW and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, Lowe’s shares have sunk to $218.65, producing a disappointing 11.7% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 10.9% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Synchrony Financial (SYF): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Synchrony Financial’s shares (currently trading at $74.51) have posted a disappointing 11% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 10.9% gain. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
